Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a data format schema

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is deleting data format schema {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted data format schema {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing data format schema {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created data format schema {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating data format schema {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete data format schema {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create data format schema {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change data format schema {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed data format schema {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
